name: Source Fidelity review for Immune Rejuvenation bundle
summary: Source metadata, registry status, study provenance, endpoint descriptions, and quantitative notes match the selected primary sources after correcting two staged author-list typos before review application. The mTOR/TORC1 trial claims stay within the PubMed abstracts, GIANTS-1 and TRIIM-X are represented as recruiting/no-results registry context, and the review source is treated as boundary context rather than efficacy evidence.

findings.claim_or_issue: The source-fidelity pass found and corrected author metadata in the staged PMID 33977284 and PMID 42169620 source records before this review was applied.
findings.why_it_matters: Author-list fidelity is part of the source audit trail even though the public interpretation does not depend on author names.
findings.recommended_action: No further action; retain the corrected staged source records during approval and publication.
